subtitle: Repair Order · Pre-populated from scan or manual entry
detailsHint: From first scan block — RO#, vehicle fields, and complaints from any page
vinHint: NHTSA vPIC — auto-fills year, make, model, engine
complaintsHint: Labels A, B, C… from any scan page — edit as needed
noComplaintsHint: Add manually or rescan the repair order to extract A, B, C…
scanRestored: Restored {{count}} saved scan page from last session
scanRestored_other: Restored {{count}} saved scan pages from last session
scanAddPageFirst: Add at least one page before processing.
scanWaitSaving: Wait for all pages to finish saving before processing.
scanNoFiles: No supported images or PDFs were selected.
scanPrepareFailed: Could not prepare files for scan.
scanOcrFallback: On-device OCR used — AI vision unavailable: {{error}}
deleteConfirm: Delete this repair order? This cannot be undone.
photoDeleteConfirm: Delete this diagnostic photo? Extracted data will be updated.
xentryPhotoDeleteConfirm: Delete this Xentry photo? Extracted data will be updated.
saveConflictServer: Loaded server version — your device edits were replaced
saveInProgress: Save still in progress — continuing with latest local data
previousLoadFailed: Could not load previous repair orders — try again.
listLoadFailedRetry: Still unable to load repair orders — check Wi‑Fi or ask your manager.
statusAiComplete: AI vision complete — finalizing repair order…
statusAiFallback: AI vision inconclusive — running on-device OCR fallback…
statusCrossValidating: Cross-validating AI vision and OCR results…
